empty.title: Your home screen is empty
empty.description: Add items to customize your home screen.
empty.addCurrentlyWatching: Add currently watching series to library
empty.addToList: Add series to your 'Currently Watching' list to get started

screen.invalidItem: The item "{schemaName}" cannot be displayed because it is missing some required options.

options.localOnlyDescription: Only anime from your local library will be shown
options.streamingDescription: All anime from your 'Currently Watching' list will be included in the library
options.noItemsAdded: No items added yet. Add some below to customize your home screen.
options.allItemsAdded: All available items have been added to your home screen.

configure.title: Configure {name}
configure.description: Customize the settings for this home item.

continueWatching.name: Continue Watching
continueWatching.description: Displays a list of episodes you are currently watching.

continueWatchingHeader.name: Continue Watching Header
continueWatchingHeader.description: Displays a header with a carousel of anime you are currently watching.

animeLibrary.name: Anime Library
animeLibrary.description: Displays anime you have downloaded or are currently watching by status.

myLists.name: My Lists
myLists.description: Displays media from your lists by status.

localAnimeLibrary.name: Local Anime Library
localAnimeLibrary.description: Displays a full grid of anime you have in your local library.

upcomingEpisodes.name: Upcoming Library Episodes
upcomingEpisodes.description: Displays a carousel of upcoming anime episodes from your library.

airedRecently.name: Recently Aired (Global)
airedRecently.description: Displays a carousel of anime episodes that aired recently.

missedSequels.name: Missed Sequels
missedSequels.description: Displays a carousel of sequels that are not in your collection.

animeScheduleCalendar.name: Anime Schedule Calendar
animeScheduleCalendar.description: Displays a calendar of anime episodes based on their airing schedule.

localAnimeLibraryStats.name: Local Anime Library Stats
localAnimeLibraryStats.description: Displays statistics from your local anime library.

discoverHeader.name: Discover Header
discoverHeader.description: Displays a header with a carousel of anime that is trending.

animeCarousel.name: Anime Carousel
animeCarousel.description: Displays a carousel of anime based on selected options.

mangaCarousel.name: Manga Carousel
mangaCarousel.description: Displays a carousel of manga based on selected options.

mangaLibrary.name: Manga Library
mangaLibrary.description: Displays a list of manga you have in your library by status.
